# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 522. Commercial Driver's Licenses
##### § 522.151 — Definition

In this subchapter, “registry” means the Glenda Dawson Donate Life-Texas Registry established under Section 692A.020 (Glenda Dawson Donate Life-texas Registry; Education Program) , Health and Safety Code.

*Added by Acts 2015, 84th Leg., R.S., Ch. 1261 (H.B.3283), Sec. 7, eff. January 1, 2016.*
